This cross-functional and highly visible role requires 5+ years of Product Management experience, particularly in SaaS and LIMS. The successful candidate will own the product lifecycle, define strategies, conduct market analysis, and ensure product innovations. The position offers a remote work option in the US, with a salary range from $100K to $154K plus bonuses.

Product Manager, Digital Health, is a full-time position responsible for leading a cross-functional product team focused on patient engagement, driving product discovery and delivery, and ensuring alignment with strategic goals and user needs. Key Responsibilities Own and prioritize the product roadmap, collaborating with cross-functional teams to define and frame customer problems Drive structured product discovery and validate ideas through various testing methodologies Champion cross-functional collaboration and elevate the voice of the customer to inform product decisions Required Qualific

jobs.role: Remote Product Manager — Builder & New Construction
jobs.description_snippet: Progressive Insurance seeks a Product Manager to lead the Builder Product Line remotely. This role involves developing strategies, managing daily operations, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to optimize performance. Candidates must have a Bachelor's degree in a related field and at least 4 years of analytical experience, ideally in property casualty insurance. Competitive salary ranges from $140,800 to $173,040 annually with gainshare incentives. A comprehensive benefits package is included, offering 401(k) matching and medical coverage.

jobs.role: Senior Product Manager, Guest Lifecycle & Loyalty
jobs.description_snippet:
About Owner

Owner is the AI-native system local business owners use to succeed, starting with restaurants.

We’re building the system that replaces the many tools owners use to run their business.

It powers everything from the restaurant’s website, online ordering, CRM, POS, and more.

Product philosophy

Most small business software makes owners do the work to get what they want: sales growth and profit growth. Owner does the work for them agentically.

Our system drives demand, converts it, and helps operators run their business day to day. As it improves, the business improves with it.

jobs.role: Staff Product Manager: Generative & Agentic AI (Remote)
jobs.description_snippet:
A leading technology company is seeking a remote Product Manager to drive product strategy for generative AI. The ideal candidate will have proven experience in product management, a strong understanding of the generative AI landscape, and exceptional collaboration and communication skills.

Responsibilities include engaging with customers, translating market dynamics into a product vision, and partnering closely with engineering. Join us to unlock the potential of AI in enterprises and promote a healthy work-life balance.

About RoomPriceGenie

Founded in 2017, RoomPriceGenie is dedicated to helping hoteliers around the globe achieve optimal pricing. We understand that many small hotels face challenges with digitalization, making their operations increasingly complex and often resulting in lost revenue. We have developed a powerful solution that enables hotels to set the right prices in just seconds. Our state‑of‑the‑art algorithm analyzes both internal hotel data and market trends to recommend pricing strategies that enhance revenue and improve booking rates. SeekOut helps organizations hire, grow, and retain talent by bringing together recruiting, talent management, and analytics into one platform. The goal is simple: help companies better understand their people and connect them to the right opportunities.
What are we looking to add to our team?

We’re looking for a Senior Product Manager to help define and build the next generation of AI-powered recruiting experiences.
